runs.note: Fixed security headers after NGINX decommission: set X-Frame-Options to DENY, added all missing required headers (HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy), set Cache-Control no-store only for authenticated responses, and fixed getTrustedClientIP to only trust X-Forwarded-For from Cloudflare IPs
